  "knot_present": "yes",
  "knot_severity": 2,

  "primary_trigger": "symbol_binding",
  "knot_quote": "Now, for each of these six triples, if we keep exactly those three cells, then the five cells are exactly that minimal path, so A and I are connected.",

  "open_diagnosis": "The model initially identifies a set of minimal paths and then incorrectly assumes that keeping exactly three cells from each minimal path will result in A and I being connected. This is a variable binding drift as the role of the cells changes from being part of a minimal path to determining connectivity. The model later corrects this by considering other configurations, indicating a repair without recovery.",

glm_parsed.knot_quote: Now, for each of these six triples, if we keep exactly those three cells, then the five cells are exactly that minimal path, so A and I are connected.
glm_parsed.open_diagnosis: The model initially identifies a set of minimal paths and then incorrectly assumes that keeping exactly three cells from each minimal path will result in A and I being connected. This is a variable binding drift as the role of the cells changes from being part of a minimal path to determining connectivity. The model later corrects this by considering other configurations, indicating a repair without recovery.
